name: C-2 control mapping: identical control_id in different frameworks is disambiguated by the (framework, control_id) tuple
command:
printf -- '- framework: soc2
  control_id: CC1.1
  legal_review_status: pending
- framework: iso27001
  control_id: CC1.1
  legal_review_status: pending
' > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" --framework iso27001 --control-id CC1.1 --reviewer counsel --date 2026-05-04 --controls-file controls.yaml 2>/dev/null && grep -A2 'framework: soc2' controls.yaml | grep -q 'pending' && grep -A2 'framework: iso27001' controls.yaml | grep -q 'reviewed_by' && echo by_pair 1>&2
